synergy.ossuary-pact.name: 藏骨堂之約
synergy.ossuary-pact.flavor: 護符貼著鉤子低鳴。骨群應聲而答。
synergy.grave-tide.name: 墓潮
synergy.grave-tide.flavor: 鹽與霜。水記得它溺斃過的一切。
synergy.last-breath-pact.name: 末息之約
synergy.last-breath-pact.flavor: 殮衣自石中汲飲。死亡的手鬆開了。
synergy.hungering-edge.name: 餓刃
synergy.hungering-edge.flavor: 這柄刃如今在別處進食。
synergy.ashen-ward.name: 灰燼結界
synergy.ashen-ward.flavor: 灰覆住餘燼。火忘卻了你的名字。
synergy.pilgrims-clarity.name: 朝聖者的澄明
synergy.pilgrims-clarity.flavor: 卷軸自行展讀。前路漸漸清晰。
synergy.twin-fangs.name: 雙牙
synergy.beggars-grace.name: 乞者恩典
rule.rupture.telegraph: 有什麼在牠皮下蠕動。牠不會安靜地死去。
rule.reform.telegraph: 水尋著裂隙。牠會再度升起。
rule.multiply.telegraph: 手自牆中伸出。天明之前，還會更多。
rule.absorb.telegraph: 你的傷餵養著牠。你出手越多，牠越強。
rule.dormant.telegraph: 牠沉睡著。深淵之眠，不容驚擾。
rule.drain.telegraph: 悲慟滲入你的骨。每一次掙扎，都耗去你僅存之力。
rule.chant.telegraph: 寂靜落下時，那聲音便升起。聆聽，它就會將你淹沒。
rule.rupture.burst: 牠在死亡中迸裂——那腫脹終究找上了你。
rule.reform.rise: 水記得自己的形狀。牠再度升起。
rule.multiply.join: 又一隻手自牆中伸出，加入戰局。
item.mantle.save: 殮衣飲下這一擊。你仍然站著。
item.mantle.saveStrong: 殮衣深深啜飲。死亡的手鬆開了。
rule.pounce.strike: 牠早已撲來。你尚未舉手格擋，那一擊已然落下。
hint.combat.1: Something waits in the dark ahead.
hint.combat.2: You hear breathing that is not your own.
hint.combat.3: The air ahead is thick with hunger.
hint.cache.1: A stillness settles ahead — nothing hunts this stretch.
hint.cache.2: The path ahead smells of dust and old supplies.
hint.cache.3: Quiet ground lies beyond. A place to breathe.
hint.corpse.1: A scent of death lingers on the air ahead.
hint.corpse.2: Someone else stopped here, and did not continue.
hint.corpse.3: The dark ahead remembers a name.
hint.explore.1: The passage ahead is unremarkable, for now.
hint.explore.2: The path continues, plain and unlit.
hint.explore.3: Nothing calls out from the way forward.
hint.exit.1: You feel the air change. Something opens beyond.
hint.exit.2: A pale light touches the edge of the dark ahead.
hint.exit.3: The walls ahead fall away into something wider.
